US ethane exports take prominence, LPG exports feed arrivals
As US ethane exports reach record highs in June, we observed a slowdown in US LPG exports as terminals with flex capacities pivoted to ethane

Iran says permits to transit Hormuz to be issued as soon as possible

The PGSA has been charged with issuing permits as fast as possible for commercial vessels wishing to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

“For 60 days, no fees will be charged from the applicants.”
